case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. KIM M. VOY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST COMPUTATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOY, KIM M. $4,274.59 PRINCIPAL, $114.77 INTEREST, $263.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,652.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT VOY, KIM M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2010
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED APR-13-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VOY, KIM M.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $263.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $750.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VOY, KIM M.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL CONTRACT AND WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
